title: Wish / If Only — Advanced
description: Regret, longing, and unreal past with WISH and IF ONLY plus subtle tense choices.
summary_pt_br: WISH + past = arrepender presente. WISH + past perfect = passado. WISH + WOULD = irritação. IF ONLY = mais forte.

scenes.subtitle_en: Regret, longing, and unreal past with WISH and IF ONLY plus subtle tense choices.
scenes.subtitle_pt: WISH + past = arrepender presente. WISH + past perfect = passado. WISH + WOULD = irritação. IF ONLY = mais forte.

scenes.text_en: Regret, longing, and unreal past with WISH and IF ONLY plus subtle tense choices. Today's focus: wish / if only — advanced. I wish I had said goodbye properly.
scenes.text_pt: WISH + past = arrepender presente. WISH + past perfect = passado. WISH + WOULD = irritação. IF ONLY = mais forte. Foco de hoje: wish / if only — advanced. Queria ter me despedido direito.

scenes.title: Wish / If Only — Advanced
scenes.body_en: WISH + past simple = regret about now. WISH + past perfect = regret about past. WISH + WOULD = annoyance at someone else's behavior. IF ONLY works identically but stronger.
scenes.body_pt: WISH + past = arrepender presente. WISH + past perfect = passado. WISH + WOULD = irritação. IF ONLY = mais forte.

examples.en: I wish I had said goodbye properly.
If only my neighbors would stop playing loud music!
examples.pt: Se ao menos os vizinhos parassem com a música alta!

examples.en: She wishes she knew how to play the guitar.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Wish / If Only — Advanced

exercise.question: Complete: "I wish I had said goodbye ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I wish I had said goodbye properly."

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
If only my neighbors would stop playing loud music!
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "If only my neighbors would stop playing loud music!"
exercise.hint_pt_br: Se ao menos os vizinhos parassem com a música alta!

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Wish / If Only — Advanced — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre wish / if only — advanced. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Dona Lúcia, what's something you wish you had done?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I wish I had traveled to Europe when I was young.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: If only my father had allowed it!

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Is there something you wish were different today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I wish my grandchildren lived closer.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What do they do that bothers you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I wish they would call more often.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What small thing would you love to know how to do?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I wish I spoke a second language fluently.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Longing keeps the heart alive, Lúcia.

scenes.title: The letters she didn't send
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe Dona Lúcia's regrets and longings. Use WISH, IF ONLY, and at least two tense variations.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On quiet Saturdays, Dona Lúcia sometimes opened the box of letters she had never sent.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: If only I had mailed these when I was still young enough to receive an answer.

paragraphs.speaker: Granddaughter
paragraphs.en: Grandma, do you regret not sending them all those years ago?

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: I wish I had been braver at twenty — I was afraid of what his reply would be.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: And I wish you would call me every Sunday, even when nothing new has happened.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Regret, Lúcia had learned, was not a prison — it was the voice reminding you what still mattered.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Wish / If Only — Advanced". Regret, longing, and unreal past with WISH and IF ONLY plus subtle tense choices. I wish I had said goodbye properly. If only my neighbors would stop playing loud music! Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Wish / If Only — Advanced". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Wish / If Only — Advanced".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
